summary: Made two surgical seam edits: the opening now more clearly picks up the prior night's escalation by implying the news reached the custodians before the bell, and the exit now more clearly hands off into the next chapter's compound-wide aftermath by signaling that the story is already spreading beyond the hall. The opening scaffold was already distinct from the adjacent chapter opening, so no structural rewrite was needed.
edits: Added an opening sentence linking the bell scene to the previous night's new trouble.
Added an exit sentence indicating the event is already passing into communal knowledge.
